rationale: Coinglass free public pages (coinglass.com/en/coins/terra-classic) display LUNC funding rates and open interest widgets, but programmatic/exact decimal values require a paid API key; correlation metrics vs BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ are not published as ready-made figures on any of the listed free sources (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me, FRED) and would require raw OHLC downloads plus manual calculation — none of which is surfaced as a citable real-time number on a free public URL at the time of this query.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/coins/terra-classic — funding rate & OI widgets visible but not freely machine-readable without API key
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/terra-luna — price/market data; no pre-computed correlation figures
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market sentiment only, no LUNC-specific derivatives data
https://defillama.com — no LUNC derivatives or correlation data available
https://fred.stlouisfed.org — NASDAQ/macro data available but cross-asset correlation to LUNC not computed
